zh.Crest, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Fran: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆可雷斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Genève於1266年2月28日出生在瑞士時，她的父親Rodolphe de Genève45歲，母親Marie de la Tour-du-Pin39歲。她於1288年5月13日與Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年12月16日享年56歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆可雷斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Genève于1266年2月28日出生在瑞士时，她的父亲Rodolphe de Genève45岁，母亲Marie de la Tour-du-Pin39岁。她于1288年5月13日与Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年12月16日享年56岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆可雷斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Genève
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1 Altered spelling of northern French Denef(v)e, a habitational name, with the preposition de, for someone from places called Neffe in the Belgian provinces of Namur and Luxembourg.
2 Dutch (de Neve): kinship name from Middle Dutch neve ‘grandson’, ‘(male) cousin’, ‘nephew’ + the definite article de.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.
Decisive Battle against the counts of Habsburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Genève was born on 28 February 1266, in Switzerland, her father, Rodolphe de Genève, was 45 and her mother, Marie de la Tour-du-Pin, was 39. She married Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois on 13 May 1288. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 16 December 1322, at the age of 56, and was buried in Crest, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Genève est née le 28 février 1266, à Suisse, son père, Rodolphe de Genève, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Marie de la Tour-du-Pin, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois le 13 mai 1288. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 décembre 1322, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Crest, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Genève am 28. Februar 1266 in Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rodolphe de Genève 45 und ihre Mutter Marie de la Tour-du-Pin 39. Sie hat am 13. Mai 1288 Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Dezember 1322 im Alter von 56 Jahren und wurde in Crest, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Genève è nata il il 28 febbraio 1266 nel Svizzera, sua padre, Rodolphe de Genève, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Marie de la Tour-du-Pin, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois il 13 maggio 1288. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 dicembre 1322, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Crest, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Genèveが1266年2月28日にスイスで生まれた時，父Rodolphe de Genèveは45歳，母Marie de la Tour-du-Pinは39歳であった。1288年5月13日にAymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年12月16日に56歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメクレストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Genève(이)가 1266년 2월 28일 스위스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rodolphe de Genève(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de la Tour-du-Pin(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1288년 5월 13일 Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 12월 16일 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 크레스트에 묻혔다.

mn.28 February 1266–16 décembre 1322: 1266 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 28–1322 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 16

pt.28 February 1266–16 décembre 1322: 28 de fevereiro de 1266–16 de dezembro de 1322
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Genève nasceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1266, em Suiça, seu pai, Rodolphe de Genève, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Marie de la Tour-du-Pin, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois em 13 de maio de 1288. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1322, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Crest, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Genève родилась 28 февраля 1266 г. в местности Швейцария, её отцу по имени Rodolphe de Genève было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de la Tour-du-Pin, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois 13 мая 1288 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 16 декабря 1322 г. в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности крест, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.28 February 1266–16 décembre 1322: 28 de febrero de 1266–16 de diciembre de 1322
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Genève nació el 28 de febrero de 1266, en Suiza, su papá, Rodolphe de Genève, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Marie de la Tour-du-Pin, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois el 13 de mayo de 1288. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1322, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Crest, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
